reviews.comment:
Buena atención, mesas simples. Para tomar una gaseosa o un cafe haciendo tiempo es ideal por sus económicos precios.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, simple tables. Ideal for having a soda or coffee while killing time, thanks to its affordable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMW9pTnN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de los playeros. La mayoría viejos mala onda y mal educados. Si no fuera que es del ACA no iría nadie a cargar combustibles ahí.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the beach attendants. Most of them are rude, ill-mannered old men. If it weren't for the ACA, no one would go there to fill up with gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3M291NmFREAE
